display.purpose: Agent names and hero headings only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--foreground); color: var(--background); padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Figtree, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 4px; border: none; transition: opacity 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Metadata Badge
components.description: Small technical indicator for agent capabilities.
components.css: .ds-badge { border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 2px 6px; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Agent Card
components.html:
Agent Name
Metadata description text.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Figtree, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; } .ds-card-content { font-family: Figtree, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted-foreground); }

narrative.overview: The A2A Registry infrastructure exists in a functional duality: The Technical Archive (Light) and The Cold Terminal (Dark). Both prioritize clarity and engineered precision over stylistic trends.

rules.name: The Restraint Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Functional Color Rule
rules.body: Use Solarized functional accents strictly for encoding meaning.

rules.name: The Designation Rule
rules.body: Agent names are system designations, never just titles.

rules.name: The Tonal Layering Rule
rules.body: Depth is communicated by tonal shifts, not shadows.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color definitions.
Do use Big Shoulders Display for agent names.
Do use system monospace for technical data.
